_doc: Mystery Booster 2 (MB2, 2024-08-02) — bespoke recipe modelled on the OFFICIAL structure from Wizards' 'What's Inside Mystery Booster 2' article: 14 cards = 10 commons/uncommons (2 per color) + 1 multicolor/artifact/common-or-uncommon land + 1 rare/mythic + 1 Future Sight-frame card (60% rare/mythic) + 1 white-bordered reprint (40% rare/mythic) + 1 playtest card. Single product type → authoritative:true. Note: our engine can't filter by card COLOR, so the 10 colored + 1 multi/art/land slots are modelled together as 11 common/uncommon draws; the Future Sight (filter future_frame), white-bordered (white_border) and playtest (playtest_card) slots are filtered exactly. There is NO guaranteed traditional foil (only <5% within the Future Sight slot, omitted here). VALUE NOTE: even faithfully modelled, a pack sims to ~$38 median in Scryfall singles vs the ~$16 sealed price — MB2 is packed with reprinted staples and Scryfall's prices for this thin, recent set are almost certainly inflated. The simulator reflects the source prices; this is not a recipe bug.

draft.tagline: 14 cards + 1 playtest · 11 commons/uncommons · 1 rare/mythic · Future Sight frame · white-bordered reprint
